data.title: LevelBlue partners with Fortra to offer advanced cybersecurity solutions, aiming to combat evolving threats.
data.description: In Dallas, LevelBlue, the leading provider of managed security services worldwide, has revealed a key partnership with Fortra, a prominent cybersecurity solutions company. This alliance merges Fortra’s top-tier products with LevelBlue’s exceptional managed services to create a holistic security solution aimed at addressing the changing threat environment. The collaboration signifies a significant achievement for LevelBlue in their commitment to offering proactive security measures.

data.title: Infinitum to unveil new EC Fan Systems & motor tech at AHR 2026 in Austin, Texas. Expanding product line at expo.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Infinitum is set to present their expansive product range at the AHR Expo. This will include the introduction of the Infinitum EC Fan Systems.

data.title: HDI unveils conference program for HDI Service & Support World, an event blending IT service management, customer support, and technical support.
data.description: In San Francisco, HDI, a leading organization in service and support excellence, has announced the conference program for HDI Service & Support World. This event is community-driven and aims to enhance the service and support industry. It combines IT service management, customer support, and technical support to unite the complete IT service and support network. HDI Service & Support World is a pivotal event for professionals in this field and will take place in a location where the entire ecosystem can converge.

data.title: Fayetteville–Springdale–Rogers, AR is best large metro & St. George, UT top small per Milken Institute's 2026 rankings.
data.description: In the latest 2026 Milken Institute Best-Performing Cities (BPC) report, Fayetteville–Springdale–Rogers, AR has been recognized as the top-performing large metropolitan area, holding this prestigious title after consistently being ranked in the top 15 since 2021. Additionally, for small cities, St. George, UT claimed the leading position in the index after being the runner-up in the previous year’s rankings. Both metro areas stood out due to their robust labor markets showcasing consistent growth, alongside their expanding high-tech sectors driving their success.

data.title: Fulcrum secures $25M funding to integrate AI into insurance, modernizing workflows for brokerages.
data.description: In San Francisco, Fulcrum, a top AI platform for insurance brokerages, revealed securing $25 million in combined Seed and Series A funding. The funding round was primarily led by CRV along with contributions from South Park Commons, Foundation Capital, and a selection of notable insurance and technology angel investors. Fulcrum aims to revolutionize insurance brokerages by integrating AI agents to streamline various tasks such as coverage and claim analysis, proposal generation, and policy management.

data.title: Italy's construction industry to grow by 2.3% in 2025, then contract by 1.5% in 2026 due to decline in building permits and high inflation - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
data.description: A report on the construction market in Italy has been released, forecasting growth in the industry. The Italian construction sector is expected to increase by 2.3% in real terms. However, a decline of 1.5% is projected for 2026 due to reduced issuance of building permits for residential and non-residential projects, along with high inflation rates. The report covers various sectors including commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets. It provides analysis up to 2029, highlighting key trends and market insights.

data.title: Lithic partners with Stearns Bank to enhance card program capabilities, for fintechs to launch consumer and commercial card programs.
data.description: In a recent announcement, Lithic, a card issuer processing platform known for facilitating cutting-edge financial experiences, revealed a new partnership with Stearns Bank. Stearns Bank, a robust financial services institution based in Minnesota and with a wealth of experience spanning over a century, serves customers across the nation. This collaboration enhances Lithic's portfolio by offering advanced card program features tailored for both consumer and commercial use. This partnership presents an opportunity for fintech firms to establish robust card programs utilizing reliable infrastructure, further expanding their service offerings.

data.title: HURC in Short Hills appoints new CEO, showcases tech-enabled services transforming hospital revenue cycles.
data.description: A recent press release from HURC based in Short Hills, New Jersey highlighted the effective capabilities of its technology-based services in enhancing hospital mid-revenue cycle operations. The company also announced the appointment of a new CEO.

data.title: Spain's construction industry grew by 4% in 2025 and projected to grow by 3.6% in 2026, driven by investments in renewable energy and transport infrastructure.
data.description: The latest report on the construction market in Spain has been released, indicating positive growth trends across various sectors. The industry is projected to expand by 4% in 2025 and 3.6% in 2026 in real terms. This growth is largely attributed to investments in sectors such as commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential areas. Key drivers of this growth include the development of renewable energy projects and advancements in transport infrastructure. These factors are expected to collectively drive business opportunities in the Spanish construction market.

data.title: dhango partners with FNBO to offer fast, scalable embedded payments to SaaS platforms, simplifying ACH, check, and card transactions.
data.description: A company called dhango, based in Austin, Texas, recently revealed a significant collaboration with FNBO (First National Bank of Omaha), focusing on enabling seamless integration of payments for various companies and platforms. This partnership aims to offer SaaS companies, ISVs, and marketplaces a quicker and more effective method for introducing and profiting from ACH, check, and card transactions. The traditional process of incorporating payment infrastructures can be tedious, costly, and limiting for many SaaS platforms. Through this collaboration, dhango seeks to address these challenges and provide a more streamlined approach for businesses to manage payments efficiently.

Professional investors continue to reduce exposure to U.S. equities aggressively. Institutional investors sold $9.2 billion of U.S. equities last week, marking the fifth consecutive week of net selling, a clear sign of sustained risk-off positioning and deteriorating confidence

data.title: Volvo to deliver 3 VNR Electric trucks to City Harvest in NYC, part of $10M Bronx is Breathing project for emissions reduction.
data.description: In Greensboro, North Carolina, on January 27, 2026, Volvo Trucks North America revealed plans to provide three zero-tailpipe-emission Volvo VNR Electric trucks to City Harvest in New York City this year. This initiative is a part of the Bronx is Breathing project aimed at minimizing noise and emissions for South Bronx communities neighboring a major freight route. The effort is supported by a substantial $10 million grant from the New York Clean Transportation Prizes program.

data.title: CUPE Ontario endorses Avi Lewis for NDP leadership. Deadline to sign up for NDP membership is Jan. 28 to vote in spring race.
data.description: In Toronto, CUPE Ontario has officially backed Avi Lewis for the leadership position of Canada’s New Democratic Party. The endorsement came on Monday after receiving a unanimous recommendation from the union’s political action committee. CUPE Ontario is urging its members and all workers in Ontario to join or renew their membership with the NDP by Wednesday, January 28, to qualify for voting rights in the upcoming party leadership competition scheduled for this spring. This move aligns with CUPE Ontario's ongoing support for workers' rights and the NDP's political goals.

data.title: China's construction industry output contracted by 1% in 2025 due to US tariffs, real estate market decline, and fixed capital investment fall - forecasts to 2029.
data.description: A recent report on the China Construction Market forecasts a 1% contraction in the industry in 2025. This decline is attributed to factors such as the high tariffs imposed by the US, a struggling real estate market, and a decrease in fixed capital investment. The report, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, provides insights on various sectors within the construction industry including Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional, and Residential markets. Looking ahead to 2029, the report offers analysis and trends for each sector.

data.title: SeoulSpice Korean Kitchen expands in Chicago with Wicker Park location grand opening celebration on Feb 3 offering $5 bowls.
data.description: SeoulSpice Korean Kitchen is expanding its presence in Chicago with the grand opening celebration of its new Wicker Park location on February 3rd. Customers can enjoy $5 bowls during the event.

data.title: Karman and Redwire secure contracts under SHIELD program worth $151 billion, pending a key caveat.
data.description: Karman and Redwire have secured contracts under the SHIELD program for anti-missile defense, which has a maximum budget of $151 billion. These two defense innovators are set to collaborate on this lucrative contract, with significant opportunities ahead.

data.title: GM stock has surged 76% since April, beating Q4 earnings estimates, poised to rise further with dividend hike.
data.description: The stock of General Motors has surged over 70% since April and is expected to maintain its upward trend following the successful surpassing of Q4 earnings projections. The U.S. automaker's impressive performance has positioned it for further growth, prompting a buy zone recommendation with a 76% increase. This development also includes plans for a dividend hike, signaling promising prospects for investors.
